headline: The Unstoppable Stock Market Rally Is Defying Fed Fears
summary: The Fed may have to hike rates later this year. But investors are focusing more on strong fundamentals for Corporate America and the economy.

headline: Stocks Rally as President Trump Signs a Preliminary Deal to End the US-Iran War
summary: The S&P 500 Index ($SPX ) (SPY ) today is up +0.73%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average ($DOWI ) (DIA ) is up +0.53%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX ) (QQQ ) is up +1.62%. June E-mini S&P futures (ESM26 ) are up +0.80%, and June E-mini Nasdaq futures...

headline: Should Investors Hold or Fold Carnival Stock Ahead of Q2 Earnings?
summary: Can CCL's record bookings, high pricing and rising onboard spending power a strong Q2 despite fuel-cost pressure?

headline: Holland America Line's Flagship Rotterdam to Debut in Mediterranean for Fall 2027 Season
summary: For the first time, Holland America Line's flagship Rotterdam will sail a series of cruises in the Mediterranean, with bookings now open for fall 2027. The five itineraries span both the Western and Eastern Mediterranean, offering a chance to experience the region through a relaxed, late-season lens.

headline: Carnival (CCL) Launches Limited Edition Bulleit Bourbon Across 14 Ships
summary: Carnival is partnering with Starboard and Diageo to introduce a limited-edition Bulleit Bourbon. The bourbon will be sold exclusively across 14 Carnival ships. The launch is tied to celebrations for America's 250th anniversary. Carnival, traded as NYSE:CCL, is adding this collaboration to its broader brand efforts at a time when the stock last closed at $29.91. Recent returns show the shares up 15.1% over the past week and 20.1% over the past month, with a 1-year return of 28.0% and a...

headline: Carnival (CCL) Stock Could Be 20.7% Undervalued After Strait Of Hormuz Reopened
summary: The reopening of the Strait of Hormuz has put fuel costs back in focus for travel stocks, and Carnival (CCL) is one of the companies investors are watching as expectations around earnings and onboard spending trends reset. See our latest analysis for Carnival. Carnival’s recent 7 day share price return of 15.08% and 30 day return of 20.07% sit against a year to date decline of 3.27%, while the 1 year total shareholder return of 28.05% and 3 year total shareholder return of about 90% point to...
